mushi.notes: Hosted Streamable HTTP MCP — recommended for Cursor plugin usage. Replace the URL with your Supabase project's edge function URL. Set MUSHI_API_KEY and MUSHI_PROJECT_ID in your shell environment or Cursor settings. Append ?read_only=1 to the URL to hide write tools.
mushi._envSetup: Export MUSHI_API_KEY=<your-mcp-read-key> and MUSHI_PROJECT_ID=<uuid> in your shell profile, or add them to Cursor → Settings → Environment Variables.

mushi-stdio.notes: stdio fallback — runs npx @mushi-mushi/mcp locally. Use this if the hosted HTTP endpoint is not configured.
